Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7BC0 "HELIRESCUE-7BC0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Heli Rescue.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the call to the subroutine at $AC00 at $7BC5 to remove attempted access to the serial bus.
